build.beforeDevCommand: bash -lc 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd $ROOT/app && npm run dev'
build.beforeBuildCommand: bash -lc 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd $ROOT/app && (npm ci || npm install) && npm run build'

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost
